title: Pokemon Detail Validation, Derived Types, Units, and Inclusive Presentation · Inference Brief: Pokedex Ts Detail Accessibility Tests
summary: The inspect command trusts a cast response, renders raw API JSON, treats unit conversion as formatting, assumes arrays are nonempty, and hides which fields were unavailable. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts detail accessibility tests increment in validated inclusive Pokemon detail card. Learners progress through prediction…
objectives: Test narrow output, headings, stable order, no-color status, missing values, hostile text, unit boundaries, and changed payloads.
Convert and label documented units, sort fields deliberately, preserve hidden ability meaning, and avoid invented conclusions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
